mapper.select:
select * from qnaBBS where 1 = 1 and qDepth = 0 and qTitle not like '[공지]%'
and qStatus < 3
and ${keyField} like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%')
order by qRef desc, qPos asc

select * from qnaBBS where cNum = #{cNum} and qDepth = 0 and qTitle not like '[공지]%' and qStatus < 3
and ${keyField} like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%')
order by qRef desc, qPos asc
select * from qnaBBS where qDepth = 0 and qTitle like '[공지]%' and qStatus < 3 order by qRegDate desc, qNum desc
select * from qnaBBS where qNum = #{qNum} and qDepth = 0 and qTitle like '[공지]%' and qStatus < 3
select * from qnaBBS where qRef = #{qRef} and qDepth = 0
select * from qnaBBS where qRef = #{qRef} and qDepth > 0 and qStatus < 3 order by qPos asc, qNum asc
select coalesce(max(qPos), 0) from qnaBBS where qRef = #{qRef}
mapper.insert: insert into qnaBBS ( qUid, qTitle, qContent, qRegDate, qPos, qRef, qDepth, parentQNum, qOriUid, qFileName, qFileSize, qStatus, cNum, createdDate, createdBy, updatedDate, updatedBy ) values ( #{qUid}, #{qTitle}, #{qContent}, now(), #{qPos}, #{qRef}, #{qDepth}, #{parentQNum}, #{qOriUid}, #{qFileName}, #{qFileSize}, #{qStatus}, #{cNum}, current_timestamp, coalesce(#{createdBy}, #{qUid}), current_timestamp, coalesce(#{updatedBy}, #{qUid}) )
mapper.update: update qnaBBS set qTitle = #{qTitle}, qContent = #{qContent}, qStatus = #{qStatus}, updatedDate = current_timestamp, updatedBy = coalesce(#{updatedBy}, #{qUid}) where qNum = #{qNum}
update qnaBBS set qStatus = 3, updatedDate = current_timestamp where qRef = #{qRef}
update qnaBBS set qStatus = 3, updatedDate = current_timestamp where qNum = #{qNum}
